name: Pumpernickel Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. DISPERSE YEAST in warm water.
2. Combine bread crumbs, wheat germ and flours, and form a well.
3. Add salt, caramel, yeast mixture, and starter.
4. Form dough, adding more bread flour if necessary to give a moderately firm texture.
5. Knead for 8-to-10 minutes until smooth and elastic, and place in a lightly oiled bowl.
6. Cover and let rise until doubled.
7. Deflate the dough, divide into 4 pieces, and form into oval shapes.
8. Cover with buttered plastic wrap and allow to double, about 45 minutes.
9. Preheat oven to 425F.
10. Slash tops of loaves with a razor blade and bake for 30-to-45 minutes.
11. Makes 4 Loaves
12. FOR THE RYE STARTER: Mix water and rye flour and let sit all day. In the evening, add 3 ounces all-purpose flour.
